aka: Everything is accomplished during the Night
trans_title: Everything is accomplished during the Night
introduction: SYNOPSISTae-ran decides to get revenge when her younger sister, Tae-sun, kills herself after she is getting pregnant. Hong Jin-pyo, CEO of Chung-mu Computers, is a big playboy. When the girls he's had relationships with are strangled one by one, Jin-pyo is arrested. Jin-pyo's wife, Yu-mi, tries to get him clemency. Yu-mi gives birth to a deformed baby. The couple's relationship grows bad due to the shock. The murderer is Yu-mi who wanted to get back at Jin-pyo for his lifestyle as a rake. She used Tae-ran to commit her murders.故事让我们自杀的哥哥和姐姐怀孕，塔·Yitaeran已经决定报复。香港金皮忠武计算机doeja总统勒死女孩玩得很开心，然后用那个花花公子猎女金皮被逮捕。妻子，由美是一种生活运动。由美一直没有与情侣金皮出生平稳关系，处于休克状态，其变形童工。犯罪分子会觉得使用taeran犯了罪的挥霍生活金皮复仇不是别人，正是由美等。
